results.title: Quantum eMotion Files Q1 Interim Financial Statements and MD&A; Confirms Annual Filings on File with SEC and Canadian Securities Regulators
results.description: Montreal, Quebec--(Newsfile Corp. - May 21, 2026) - Quantum eMotion Corp. (NYSE American: QNC) (TSXV: QNC) (FSE: 34Q0) ("QeM" or the "Company"), a global quantum technology company pioneering next-generation solutions in Quantum Random Number Generation (QRNG) and quantum-safe encryption, today announced that it has filed its unaudited condensed interim consolidated financial statements and related Management's Discussion and Analysis for the three-month period ended March 31, 2026

results.title: Harford County data center ban advances as leaders weigh permanent prohibition
results.description: Harford County data center ban advances as officials consider emergency legislation over energy use, zoning, water demand and local concerns.

results.title: Odisha Works Minister Puts Key Projects on Fast Track, Cracks Whip on Quality & Timelines
results.description: In a no-nonsense review meeting that sent a clear message across the state’s construction sector, Works Minister Prithviraj Harichandan today put projects worth over Rs 50 crore under the microscope. With quality, speed, and zero tolerance for negligence as his mantra, the minister warned that any slip-ups — by officials or contractors — will invite [...] The post Odisha Works Minister Puts Key Projects on Fast Track, Cracks Whip on Quality & Timelines appeared first on Pragativadi I Latest Odisha News in English I Breaking News .
